title: Joist exemplar library record v0 (EMBODIMENT_APPROACH §P3)
description: One visual-pattern-keyed exemplar: (rendered appearance ↔ authored contract-HTML [↔ Elementor JSON where it exists]). Records are retrieved by retrieve.mjs as few-shot context for authoring agents — retrieval replaces fine-tuning at our scale. Store layout (all paths relative to eval/grader/exemplars/): records/<id>.json (this schema), html/<id>.html (authored snippet, self-contained renderable, assets under html/assets/), renders/<id>.png (local-chromium render, pre-transpile). NEVER admit a record whose verification rests on the old deflated/inflated deterministic graders.

id.description: Unique record id; also the basename of html/ + renders/ files.

constructIds.description: Atlas construct vocabulary (eval/grader/atlas/atlas.json v0.1.0) present in this exemplar. Primary retrieval key.

visualDescriptor.description: Compact visual key. palette + densityTags are computed DETERMINISTICALLY from the render PNG by lib.mjs describePng() — the same function retrieve.mjs runs on the query crop, so keys and queries live in one space.

structuralSignature.description: §4.1 pre-registered enum; assigned by the record author from the section's top-level layout.

palette.description: Top-3 quantized dominant colors of the render, most frequent first (lib.mjs).

densityTags.description: Closed tag set computed from the render PNG (lib.mjs): bg luma class, ink-coverage class, chroma class, aspect class.

renderPng.description: Store-relative path to the local-chromium render of authoredHtml (renders/<id>.png). WP-free, pre-transpile.

authoredHtml.description: Store-relative path to the authored snippet (html/<id>.html). Self-contained single-file contract HTML (knowledge/AUTHORING_CONTRACT.md): one head <style>, body = the section.

elementorJson.description: Store-relative path to the verified Elementor JSON fragment for this section. NULL until the WP sandbox phase (P4+) produces save-surviving trees; never fake it.

provenance.description: spike = section of the proven HTML-first clerk spike; re-author = re-authored from capture artifacts (incl. the P2 contract re-author and the local-fidelity partial); verified-clone = judge-passed section from a real clone run; synthetic = authored from scratch for construct coverage.

status.description: judged = vision-judge tile evidence vs the real source; pixel-parity = pixel-diff-proven against a judged artifact; look-only = human/agent LOOK at render vs source crop, no judge run; lint-clean-rendered = synthetic (no source ground truth — lint-clean + renders sanely, NO fidelity claim).

evidence.description: Paths/refs backing the status (judge results.json, lint reports, pixel-diff numbers, source crops). /tmp paths are volatile — flagged inline.

lint.description: lint-authoring.mjs verdict on authoredHtml at record-build time. Non-clean records are admitted ONLY for proven provenance (e.g. the spike's V-NEST section) and must list violations here.

source.description: What this exemplar depicts (site, source-crop path if any, authoring viewport width).

hash.description: sha256 of the authored HTML bytes — integrity + dedupe key.
